_note: One-time cutover: Workers full-stack app/marketing → Pages + thin proxy workers. Run: source scripts/bw-cloudflare-live-build-env.sh && export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="$CLOUDFLARE_BUILDS_ADMIN_TOKEN" && node scripts/migrate-to-pages-model.mjs
notes: API workers (roxabi-live, roxabi-live-staging) keep Workers Builds — do not delete their triggers.
After migration, frontends deploy via Pages git-connect; proxy workers only on worker.ts changes.
